title: Authentication & Security Platform
description: Implement a comprehensive authentication and security platform including multi-factor authentication, session management, and OWASP-compliant security hardening for the customer self-service portal.
acceptanceCriteria:
- MFA is enforced for all customer logins
- Sessions expire after 15 minutes of inactivity
- Re-authentication is required for sensitive operations
- All authentication events are audit-logged
- Security headers pass OWASP ZAP scan
- Penetration test findings are P3 or lower

title: Account Dashboard
description: Build the account dashboard displaying customer accounts, balances, and transaction history with search, filter, and export capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Customers see all accounts (Checking, Savings, Money Market, CD) with balances
- Transaction history shows last 30 days by default, searchable up to 18 months
- Transactions exportable as CSV and PDF
- Pending transactions displayed separately with visual indicator
- Page loads in under 2 seconds (P95)

title: Fund Transfers
description: Enable internal fund transfers between customer's own accounts and to other Contoso customers, with payee management, transfer limits, fraud checks, and cancellation capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Internal transfers (own accounts) process in real-time
- Transfers to other Contoso customers enforce daily ($5K) and per-transaction ($2.5K) limits
- New payees have 24-hour hold before first transfer
- Re-authentication required for transfers > $500
- Fraud velocity checks prevent rapid successive transfers
- Pending transfers can be cancelled

title: Bill Pay
description: Implement bill payment functionality including biller search/management, one-time and recurring payments, and payment reminders.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Customers can search biller directory and add billers manually
- One-time and recurring payments can be created, edited, paused, and cancelled
- Recurring payment frequencies: weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly
- Payment reminders sent 3 days before scheduled payment
- Payments cut off at 4 PM ET for same-day processing

title: Support Tickets
description: Build a customer-facing support ticket system for submitting, tracking, and managing support requests with comment threading and SLA visibility.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Customers can submit tickets with category, subject, description, and attachments
- Ticket statuses visible: Submitted, In Review, Awaiting Customer, Resolved, Closed
- Customers can add comments and reopen resolved tickets within 7 days
- SLA expectations displayed per category

title: Document Upload
description: Implement secure document upload with virus scanning, document request workflow, status tracking, and 7-year retention compliance.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Customers can upload PDF, JPG, PNG, TIFF files (25 MB per file, 100 MB per request)
- All uploads scanned for viruses before acceptance
- Document requests from back-office visible with deadlines
- Documents retained for 7 years per regulatory requirements
- Customers can view but not delete previously uploaded documents

title: Notifications
description: Build notification infrastructure with email and in-app delivery, mandatory security notifications, and customer-configurable notification preferences.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Email and in-app notifications operational for Phase 1
- Mandatory notifications (login, password change, large transfers) cannot be disabled
- Customers can configure optional notification preferences per category
- In-app notification center shows read/unread with badge count

title: Profile Management
description: Enable customers to view and edit their profile information, manage preferences, and change passwords with appropriate re-verification.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Customers can view all profile fields
- Editable fields: email (re-verify), phone (OTP), address, preferences
- Non-editable fields marked clearly with 'contact support' guidance
- Password change requires current password + MFA
